heading: Execution against revenue officer
label: 2006 Execution against revenue officer
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 842 (R.S. § 989).Changes were made in phraseology.
Amendments2002—Par. (2). inserted “, the Director, Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, Department of Justice,” after “the Secretary of the Treasury”.Pub. L. 107–296

Effective Date of 2002 AmendmentAmendment by effective 60 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date note under , Domestic Security.Pub. L. 107–296section 4 of Pub. L. 107–296section 101 of Title 6Nov. 25, 2002

children.text: the officer acted under the directions of the Secretary of the Treasury, the Director, Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, Department of Justice, or other proper Government officer.
